---
title: "Publicatins"
---

**Bolded author indicates the lab directors.**  
<sup>U</sup> Undergraduate student co-author  
<sup>G</sup> Graduate student co-author


### Peer-Reviewed Manuscripts

**Schmutz, P.P.**, & T. Briggs<sup>U</sup>, and **S.R. Seals**. 2025. Lagging behind: Impact of non-native gravel within a coastal dune system. *Aeolian Research*, *72*, 100957. [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aeolia.2024.100957](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aeolia.2024.100957)


### Manuscripts In Review

Cox, D., **P.P. Schmutz**, and S.R. Seals. In Review (2026). Modeling Sea Turtle Nesting Probability: Evaluating Loggerhead Nest Site Selection Using Presence–Pseudo-Absence Data. *Ecosphere*.
